name: wxcode-admin-pixel-liveops
title: Pixel LiveOps Admin
description: Dark-mode game studio live-operations dashboard — neon purple/cyan accent on deep-space backgrounds. Sidebar game switcher, topbar period filter, 4 KPI tiles (DAU / D1 retention / ARPDAU / live events), DAU chart, live events board, top in-game items table, player segments panel. Original archetype for game ops teams.

query.en: Build me a dark-mode live-ops admin dashboard for a game studio — sidebar with game switcher, KPI tiles for DAU/retention/ARPDAU/live events, a DAU trend chart, a live events board with status pills, a top in-game items list, and a player segments panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode live-ops admin dashboard for a game studio — sidebar with game switcher, KPI tiles for DAU/retention/ARPDAU/live events, a DAU trend chart, a live events board with status pills, a top in-game items list, and a player segments panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
